{
  "judge_id": "J001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work (CalibVar-v1) and articulates the delta, but does not map against other relevant works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (external baselines for comparison).",
    "RX.1": "The agent consistently flags uncertainty for several claims, such as the need for external baseline comparisons and subgroup calibration details.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's critique is entirely within the scope of the requested review, addressing all relevant dimensions without drift.",
    "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential overclaims in the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides detailed traceability for each recommendation, explaining the source and rationale behind every critique."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.95,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work (CalibVar-v1) and articulates the delta, but does not map against other relevant works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (external baselines for comparison).
rationale.RX.1: The agent consistently flags uncertainty for several claims, such as the need for external baseline comparisons and subgroup calibration details.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's critique is entirely within the scope of the requested review, addressing all relevant dimensions without drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors or harmful content and identifies potential overclaims in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides detailed traceability for each recommendation, explaining the source and rationale behind every critique.
